medium.simulation: woodblock or linoleum carving — all marks look gouged or cut, not drawn or painted
medium.substrate: aged kraft paper or raw cardboard — warm ochre-tan ground (#C4955A range), visible paper texture
medium.ink: single near-black ink layer (#1A1208), applied with visible pressure variation and tool drag marks
medium.print_authenticity: slight ink bleed at edges of forms, micro gaps where carve was shallow, no smooth gradients whatsoever

color.base_palette: monochromatic — near-black on kraft tan, two-tone only
color.accent_usage: MAXIMUM two accent colors, used only as selective spot color on 1-2 focal details
color.accent_colors: neon magenta (#FF00C8) and amber orange (#FF8C00) — as if a second UV ink pass
color.accent_rule: accents appear only on supernatural / mystical focal points (e.g., glowing eyes, rune marks), never on background or structural elements

mark_making.style: all shading done via parallel gouge lines, cross-hatching, or stipple — never smooth tonal fills
mark_making.stroke_character: slightly uneven, hand-cut quality — wobble in long lines is correct and desirable
mark_making.negative_space: light areas are bare substrate showing through, not white paint
mark_making.texture_density: heavy in shadow areas, sparse in highlights, consistent directional grain

composition.format: wide cinematic crop, approximately 2:1 landscape ratio
composition.figure_scale: central figure fills roughly 60-70% of frame height, slightly off-center
composition.background_treatment: flat esoteric geometric line work — thin, delicate, sacred geometry or occult diagrams — creates texture without competing with figure
composition.border: decorative geometric frame using same line weight as background symbols, inset from edge

geometric_overlay.style: occult / esoteric sacred geometry — Solomonic seals, Enochian grids, Masonic compasses and squares, alchemical diagrams, Star of David variants, Metatron's Cube fragments
geometric_overlay.line_weight: fine, uniform, clearly thinner than figure outlines
geometric_overlay.integration: layered behind figure, partially obscured — feels like the background IS a ritual diagram or grimoire page
geometric_overlay.density: moderate — legible as symbols, not abstract noise

figure_style.outline: heavy blocked silhouette, cut as a single massed form with interior detail carved out
figure_style.detail_level: readable at medium scale — iconic not illustrative
figure_style.anatomy: slightly exaggerated, dramatic — power pose preferred
figure_style.clothing: heavy robes, cloaks, or layered garments rendered as stacked carved planes

subject_guidance.character: the Puck Prophet — a hockey goalie masked figure with occult / supernatural power
subject_guidance.mask: goalie mask is the primary identity marker — should always be present and prominent
subject_guidance.supernatural_indicators: glowing eyes on mask (accent color), magical energy, floating runes, ritual implements
subject_guidance.hockey_elements: hockey stick as staff or wand, puck as ritual object, ice/rink geometry abstracted into sacred geometry patterns
subject_guidance.tone: sinister but not villainous — ancient, knowing, ambiguous — a seer not a destroyer

what_to_avoid: color fills beyond the two accent colors
cartoon or comic book linework (no clean vector-style outlines)
modern flat design or icon aesthetics

prompt_template: Generate [CONCEPT] in the style of a linocut woodblock print on aged kraft paper. Near-black ink on warm tan substrate, all shading via carved gouge marks and cross-hatching, no gradients. Sparse neon magenta and amber orange spot color on supernatural focal elements only. Background filled with fine-line sacred geometry, Masonic symbolism, and esoteric diagrams. Wide cinematic 2:1 crop with decorative geometric border. Heavy carved figure silhouette, dramatic pose. Print authenticity: slight ink bleed, visible tool marks, hand-cut line quality.
